channel.title: Toml on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Toml on Arrans github.io

item.title: TomWright/dasel
item.description: Select, put and delete data from JSON, TOML, YAML, XML and CSV files with a single tool. Supports conversion between formats and can be used as a Go package.

item.title: jzelinskie/faq
item.description: Format Agnostic jQ – process various formats with libjq
